text: 2  The diagram shows the curve \(y = x^3 - 4x + 1\) intersecting the line \(y = x + 3\) at the points \(A\) and \(B\).
figure_description: Graph of y = x^3 - 4x + 1 and y = x + 3 showing intersection points A and B

text:
(a)  Find the coordinates of \(A\) and \(B\). [4]
(b)  Find the area of the region enclosed by the curve and the line. [5]
